form.formComment: Having third race start. At very long odds at debut, second last of 13 at this track on February 22 over 1000m, 7 len behind Shezaripper carrying 58.6kg at $67. Second-up 3rd of 8 at Durbanville on March 25 over 1000m, 4.5 len behind Preacher Man carrying 60kg at $17. Should be right in the finish.

form.formComment: Was at big odds at debut, ran last of 8 at this track on February 28 over 1000m, 10 len behind Grapes Of Wrath carrying 60kg at $34. Cannot enthuse after the moderate debut effort.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Jumped slow, losing three lengths and raced green.

form.formComment: Resuming after a break; only one run when 9th of 12 at this track on February 4 over 1000m, 10 len behind World Series with 57.5kg at $67. Solid return wouldn't surprise.

form.formComment: Resuming after a 11 weeks break. Finished off last campaign 11th of 13 at this track January 31 over 1100m, 7 len behind Red Spice carrying 56.5kg at $34. On debut sixth of 12 at this track January 10 over 1000m, 9 len behind Champagne Castle with 56.5kg at $21. Expected to play a major role.
